calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-26-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code section 68608(b). Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-08-2018 Continued To Sep-25-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appeareance by Plaintiff. Plaintiff's Counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set Sep-25-2018 at 10:30 AM in Dept. 610. *** NOTICE: Impending Discretionary Dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b).*** JUDGE TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk J Lee. Proceedings not reported. (610)
